subject: A rolled scroll bound with a red-tipped cord, rendered in warm brown and gold tones, with orange energy crackling at the edges — a Pokémon Tool item card tied to the Single Strike battle style
description: The art depicts a cylindrical scroll rolled tightly and tied with a cord bearing a red tip, presented as an isolated object against a warm, glowing background. Orange-gold energy effects radiate from both sides of the scroll, giving it a charged, martial quality. The scroll's surface has a warm parchment tone with subtle texture. The Single Strike logo (red and black) is visible as a graphic element in the upper right of the card. No figures, creatures, or environmental setting is depicted — the composition is pure still-life object art.
foreground: rolled scroll with cord and red tip, orange energy effects at edges
